# Briefly
// One sentence: the big outcome this epic delivers

# Goals
// Typically at least 1 goal per sub-ticket that will be required, but they're not strictly linked.
// shouldn't be an epic if there's not at least 2 goals.

## Goal 1
// description of goal 1
## Goal 2
// description of goal 2


# Out of scope
// What this epic deliberately won't do. Your single best defence against scope creep, so be specific.
// e.g. "Not touching the legacy billing flow", "No mobile support this round"


# Open Questions
// Decisions still pending. Park them here instead of blocking the whole epic on them.
// Not ready for development until this section is closed. Answers should be baked into the other sections or sub tickets.
